rationale: Audience overlap is real (broad hypercasual satisfaction-seekers), but mechanically this is a block-placement/grid-fill puzzle hook with zero relationship to Roof Rails' running, pole-extending, rail-sliding loop — recreating it would require fabricating gameplay that doesn't exist in the app, risking misleading-ad flags. Palette (green/indigo/yellow) also clashes with the cyan/pastel cityscape DNA. Skip a direct copy; if the team wants to chase the "satisfaction" emotional pitch, adapt it natively via rapid pole-piece pickup montages or rail-slide combo clears with a "GENIUS/PSYCHOPATH" tier overlay.
